overview_zh: 本期从 181 个结构化来源中生成，候选 144 条，跨期排除历史已展示 130 条，入选 13 条。所有条目均保留原始来源链接；若真实抓取不足，则仅发布未展示过的来源索引记录，不用测试数据冒充更新。
overview_en: This brief is generated from 181 structured sources with 144 candidates, 130 previously displayed items excluded, and 13 selected items. Every item keeps an original source link; if live fetching is insufficient, the site publishes only not-yet-shown source-index records instead of fake news.

items.title: How agents are transforming work

items.title: Vercel Flags no longer requires SDK Keys for Vercel deployments
items.summary_zh: 重点：New projects using Vercel Flags no longer need to configure SDK Keys or the FLAGS environment variable when evaluating flags inside a Vercel deployment. At runtime, the Vercel adapter automatically receives a short-lived OIDC token, so authentication is han
items.summary_en: Focus: New projects using Vercel Flags no longer need to configure SDK Keys or the FLAGS environment variable when evaluating flags inside a Vercel deployment. At runtime, the Vercel adapter automatically receives a short-lived OIDC token, so authentication is handled for you with zero configuration
